stable_semantics: Shared DCI configuration resolves with explicit overrides taking precedence
Source Judge checks resolve the repository module path without caller configuration
Pi runtime controls map to literal argument vectors without shell interpretation
Interactive execution preserves lifecycle and final-answer semantics
Terminal execution stays direct and artifact-free while returning child exit status
Completed and failed runs publish parseable native lifecycle evidence
Compatible resume reuses the authorized run while isolating protocol attempts
Judge requests produce boolean verdicts through credential-safe transport
Exact cache reuse binds answer evidence and complete request configuration
The digest-bound 533-row inventory delegates complete fine-grained batch coverage
Batch reuse metrics analysis figures and exports retain deterministic product semantics
Both products expose independently runnable basic examples without launching the other product
Both runtime-context examples preserve exact question corpus tools thinking max-turn and evaluation controls
The installed wheel contains Asterion DCI without packaging the source DCI module
Installed commands and resources resolve outside the repository
The installed Pi-default application selects its bundled assembly independently
Application projection retains durable references while excluding provider response bodies
